keywords: carriage bolts, square neck bolts, DIN 603, wood construction fasteners, timber bolts

body.en: Carriage bolts (also called round head square neck bolts or coach bolts) feature a smooth, rounded head with a square section beneath that prevents rotation during installation. The square neck bites into wood fibers, eliminating the need for a washer and preventing the bolt from spinning when the nut is tightened. This makes them ideal for wood-to-wood and wood-to-metal connections where a smooth appearance is desired. Related resources: high-tensile bolts anchor bolts stainless steel fasteners hex bolts lock nuts washers self-drilling screws socket screws. DIN 603 is the European standard for carriage bolts. The standard specifies dimensions, mechanical properties, and testing requirements. Key dimensions include thread diameter (M5 to M24), overall length (25mm to 300mm), head diameter, and square neck dimensions. The thread length formula is typically 2d + 6mm for bolts up to 150mm length. Standards-based procurement requires continuous learning as ISO, ASTM, DIN, and GB standards are revised every 3-5 years. The most common standards used in international fastener trade are ISO 898-1 (mechanical properties), ISO 3506-1 (stainless), ISO 3269 (acceptance inspection), ISO 4042 (coatings), and ISO 1502 (thread gauges). Carriage bolts are widely used in African construction: timber frame buildings—structural connections in traditional and modern timber construction; outdoor structures—decks, pergolas, and outdoor furniture; agricultural buildings—farm buildings, storage facilities, and livestock shelters; and furniture manufacturing—where smooth heads provide aesthetic appeal. For African environments, material selection is critical. Carbon steel carriage bolts with hot-dip galvanizing offer excellent corrosion resistance for outdoor and coastal applications. Stainless steel A2 (304) provides superior corrosion resistance but at higher cost. Zinc-plated carriage bolts are suitable for indoor use or temporary structures. The verification checklist applies to both initial supplier qualification and ongoing batch inspection. For high-risk applications (load-bearing structural, pressure vessels, mining, marine), add fatigue testing, salt-spray testing (ASTM B117), torque-tension testing, and post-installation inspection. The cost of additional verification is 0.1-0.3% of order value, while undetected quality failures can be 10-100x the order value in damages. Proper installation: Drill a pilot hole slightly larger than the thread diameter but smaller than the square neck. Insert the carriage bolt from the smooth side (where you want the head visible). The square neck should face the wood surface. Use a washer and nut on the opposite side. Tighten with a wrench while the square neck prevents rotation. Do not over-tighten—excessive torque can damage wood fibers. Supplier evaluation should be a continuous process, not a one-time exercise. faqItems.question: What is the difference between carriage bolts and hex bolts?
faqItems.answer: Carriage bolts (DIN 603) have a round head with a square collar below the head that locks into wood - preventing rotation when nuts are tightened from the opposite side. Hex bolts have a six-sided head and require wrench access from the bolt side. Carriage bolts provide a smooth, finished appearance on one side.

faqItems.question: How do I install carriage bolts in wood?
faqItems.answer: Installation steps: 1) Drill a pilot hole slightly larger than the bolt shank; 2) Insert bolt from the smooth-side (visible side); 3) The square collar prevents rotation; 4) Add washer and hex nut from opposite side; 5) Tighten with wrench. For hardwoods, pre-drilling is essential to prevent wood splitting.

faqItems.question: What are the applications for carriage bolts in African construction?
faqItems.answer: Carriage bolts are ideal for: Timber frame construction - widely used in roof trusses and wooden structures across Africa; Agricultural structures - barns, storage facilities; Playground equipment - smooth head prevents injury; Furniture assembly - clean finished appearance; Bridge decking where one-sided access is common.

faqItems.question: What is the difference between zinc-plated and hot-dip galvanized carriage bolts?
faqItems.answer: Zinc-plated carriage bolts have 5-15μm electroplated zinc coating - suitable for indoor and dry environments. Hot-dip galvanized (HDG) bolts have 45-85μm zinc coating applied by dipping in molten zinc - essential for outdoor African construction, mining areas, and humid coastal regions. HDG provides 5-10x more corrosion protection.

faqItems.question: How do I choose between different lengths of carriage bolts?
faqItems.answer: Choose carriage bolt length by: 1) Material thickness being fastened - bolt should pass through with 2-3 threads extending beyond nut; 2) General rule: minimum 3 threads engagement in nut; 3) For timber, consider wood compression over time; 4) Longer is not always better - excess length reduces shear capacity. Standard lengths available: 20mm to 300mm for DIN 603.

q.en: What is the difference between a carriage bolt and a regular hex bolt?
q.zh: 马车螺栓和普通六角螺栓有什么区别？
q.es: ¿Cuál es la diferencia entre un perno de carruaje y un perno hexagonal regular?
q.fr: Quelle est la différence entre un boulon de carrosserie et un boulon hexagonal régulier?
q.pt: Qual é a diferença entre um parafuso de carruagem e um parafuso hexagonal regular?

a.en: Carriage bolts (DIN 603) feature a round domed head with a square neck underneath that prevents rotation during installation - ideal for wood-to-wood connections where only one wrench is needed. Regular hex bolts require two wrenches (one to hold the head, one to tighten the nut). The domed head of a carriage bolt provides a finished appearance and prevents snagging.
a.zh: 马车螺栓（DIN 603）具有圆顶带头，下方有方形颈部，可在安装过程中防止旋转——非常适合只需一把扳手的木对木连接。普通六角螺栓需要两把扳手。马车螺栓的圆顶头提供成品外观并防止绊绊。
a.es: Los pernos de carruaje tienen cuello cuadrado que previene rotación.
a.fr: Les boulons de carrosserie ont un col carré qui empêche la rotation.
a.pt: Os parafusos de carruagem têm pescoço quadrado que impede rotação.

q.en: What size carriage bolts are most commonly used in African timber construction?
q.zh: 非洲木结构中最常用的马车螺栓规格是什么？
q.es: ¿Qué tamaños de pernos de carruaje se usan más comúnmente en la construcción de madera africana?
q.fr: Quelles tailles de boulons de carrosserie sont les plus couramment utilisées dans la construction africaine en bois?
q.pt: Quais tamanhos de parafusos de carruagem são mais usados na construção de madeira africana?

a.en: In African timber construction, the most common carriage bolt sizes are M10 (3/8") and M12 (1/2") for general applications, M16 (5/8") for heavy structural connections, and M20 (3/4") for major load-bearing beams. Lengths typically range from 40mm to 200mm depending on timber thickness. M10x80mm and M12x100mm are the workhorse sizes for roof trusses and pergola construction.
a.zh: 在非洲木结构中，最常用的马车螺栓规格是M10（3/8英寸）和M12（1/2英寸）用于一般应用，M16（5/8英寸）用于重型结构连接，M20（3/4英寸）用于主要承重梁。长度通常在40mm至200mm之间，根据木材厚度而定。M10x80mm和M12x100mm是屋顶桁架和凉棚建设的主力规格。
a.es: M10 y M12 son los más comunes, M16 para conexiones estructurales pesadas.
a.fr: M10 et M12 sont les plus courants, M16 pour connexions structurelles lourdes.
a.pt: M10 e M12 são os mais comuns, M16 para conexões estruturais pesadas.

q.en: Should carriage bolts be used with washers in timber construction?
q.zh: 木结构中是否应该使用垫圈配合马车螺栓？
q.es: ¿Se deben usar arandelas con pernos de carruaje en construcción de madera?
q.fr: Les rondelles doivent-elles être utilisées avec des boulons de carrosserie dans la construction en bois?
q.pt: Devem ser usadas arruelas com parafusos de carruagem na construção de madeira?

a.en: Yes, washers are essential with carriage bolts in timber construction. Use a flat washer under the nut (and optionally under the head in softwoods) to distribute load and prevent the square neck from pulling into the wood. For outdoor African applications, use hot-dip galvanized or stainless steel washers to match the carriage bolt finish and prevent galvanic corrosion. A spring washer can be added under the nut for vibration resistance.
a.zh: 是的，在木结构中垫圈对于马车螺栓至关重要。在螺母下使用平垫圈（对于软木也可在头下使用）以分配载荷并防止方形颈部拉入木材。对于非洲户外应用，使用热浸镀锌或不锈钢垫圈以匹配马车螺栓表面处理并防止电偶腐蚀。可以添加弹簧垫圈在螺母下方以提高抗振动能力。
a.es: Sí, usar arandelas planas bajo la tuerca, galvanizadas para exteriores.
a.fr: Oui, utiliser des rondelles plates sous l'écrou, galvanisées pour l'extérieur.
a.pt: Sim, usar arruelas planas sob a porca, galvanizadas para exteriores.

q.en: What finish is best for carriage bolts used in Zimbabwe and South African outdoor construction?
q.zh: 津巴布韦和南非户外建筑使用的马车螺栓最佳表面处理是什么？
q.es: ¿Qué acabado es mejor para los pernos de carruaje usados en construcción exterior en Zimbabue y Sudáfrica?
q.fr: Quel fini est le meilleur pour les boulons de carrosserie utilisés dans la construction extérieure au Zimbabwe et en Afrique du Sud?
q.pt: Qual acabamento é melhor para parafusos de carruagem usados em construção externa no Zimbábue e África do Sul?

a.en: For Zimbabwe and South African outdoor timber construction, hot-dip galvanized (HDG) carriage bolts are the standard choice, providing 50+ years of corrosion resistance in the harsh African climate. Stainless steel 316 is recommended for coastal areas (Durban, Maputo, Dar es Salaam) where salt spray accelerates corrosion. Electrogalvanized carriage bolts are suitable for indoor use or temporary structures only.
a.zh: 对于津巴布韦和南非户外木结构，热浸镀锌（HDG）马车螺栓是标准选择，在恶劣的非洲气候中提供50年以上的耐腐蚀性。不锈钢316推荐用于沿海地区（德班、马普托、达累斯萨拉姆），那里的盐雾加速腐蚀。电镀锌马车螺栓仅适用于室内或临时结构。
a.es: Galvanizado en caliente para uso exterior general, acero inoxidable 316 para zonas costeras.
a.fr: Galvanisé à chaud pour usage extérieur général, acier inoxydable 316 pour zones côtières.
a.pt: Galvanizado a quente para uso externo geral, aço inoxidável 316 para zonas costeiras.
